descriptions.text: Become a Team Rocket recruit and experience the events that parallel Red's story in Kanto!

You begin the adventure as just another recruit at the Inta Island headquarters in the Seven Islands, with the intention of gradually rising in the organization. You must successfully complete the missions assigned to you by your superiors.

Your story takes place in the same timeline as the beginning of Red and Blue's adventure, and, since at some point you will be transferred to Kanto, you will have the opportunity to witness the history of Red/Blue from the perspective of a member of Team Rocket, and even more, see everything that happened behind it (here of course we enter into theories), trying to make everything that happens can be considered canonical within the original games, and at the same time throw in some surprises.

Therefore, the idea of ​​this hack is that you, as a random Rocket recruit, can do everything in your power to reverse the classic situation in which Team Rocket and Giovanni are destroyed by Red, doing justice in part by giving a villain our ability as a player, so that there will be a clash between this and the canonical story (which will be maintained in this hack) that we all know.
